svg.title: OneBrain Harness OS — 4-layer architecture
svg.desc: Four stacked layers: OneBrain (plugin and CLI — skills, hooks, memory, indexing, checkpoints), Harness (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex, Qwen — bring your own), LLM (local or cloud intelligence), and the Markdown vault as the source of truth. Dashed flows run both directions between layers.
